content: Wave 4 COMPLETE. All 4 agents delivered: FlashAttention GPU PTX kernel with shared memory (8 tests), gradient penalty with WGAN-GP/JVP/VJP (18 tests), PagedAttention with page pool and multi-sequence manager (14 tests), GGUF parser with Q4/Q5/Q8 dequantization (19 tests). 59 new tests. Committing.
